programme.title: Agatha Christie's Hjerson (Dubbed): Episode 03
programme.desc: On the beach in Hjersons hometown, a man donning a chicken costume has been brutally beaten and then suddenly disappears. Hjerson and Klara follow tracks to a location that brings back distant memories for Hjerson.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - Al Jennings and the Legend of Dick West: Tired of his boring life, attorney Al Jennings dreams of the adventures he reads in dime novels. After a chance encounter with Dick West, Jennings joins the outlaw's gang and learns that a life of crime isn't as glamorous as he thought it would be.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Jim Clyman: Frontier Survivor: When he is separated from his trapping party, frontiersman Jim Clyman is 600 miles from the nearest fort. To survive the grueling trek, he must put his fate in the hands of Native Americans, without knowing if they will help him or kill him on sight.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Salvaged Stools, Baby Wraps, and Porch Swings: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In New Orleans, Ross Lunz shows Jill how he takes street signs damaged by Hurricane Katrina, and turns them into unique furniture that captures the spirit and resilience of the city. In Northport, Alabama, Jill meets Jessica Tuggle, a woman who weaves baby wraps with hand dyed yarn, allowing mothers to wear their babies on their bodies. Finally, Jill travels to Las Vegas and learns how Tom McGrady puts his heart and soul into beautiful wooden porch swings.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Ohio: Called the Buckeye State, Ohio is nicknamed for a nut that spawned a look-alike candy treat. But what other foods are famous in Ohio? Taylor Hicks is on a mission to find out. In this episode of State Plate, he'll take a trip into Amish country to uncover the historic origins of baby swiss cheese. He'll scour chili-crazed Cincinnati to see how many ways they can serve it up. He'll pick pawpaws – a state fruit so nice, they named it twice. And, he'll seek out the American-roots of the Polish pierogi – a savory dumpling hearty enough to fill even the biggest state plate.

programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Final Cow Down, The: During a long drought in lower Alabama, the cowboys have been chasing green grass throughout the surrounding area. Through new partnerships with other ranchers, they've finally ended up with a bumper crop of calves in north Alabama and a healthy herd in south Florida. Cody and Misty seek out the perfect high-value bull to build their growing cattle business, and they watch as their dream home finally takes shape. Bubba and Kaley welcome baby Ripp Walker Thompson into the world. Booger and Jaclyn surprise Grandma with a cowboy cookbook filled with her recipes and stories from life on the range.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - The Ultimate Cowboy: Country music icon, Trace Adkins, hosts INSP's first competition show, Ultimate Cowboy Showdown. Twelve real working cowboys from all walks of life lock horns for a prize that could change their lives. As the contestants get settled in on a cattle ranch, friendships form and tensions rise between them. Things heat up between two of the competitors when a cowboy feels disrespected. In the first challenge, the cowboys are split up into two teams where they must sort their own team's cattle out of a mixed herd. Trace welcomes two expert cattlemen to help judge their performances. In the end, Trace sends two contestants packing, leaving only ten cowboys standing.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - George Croghan: Frontier Peacemaker: When Chief Pontiac organizes a coalition of Native American tribes to attack British forts, frontier trader George Croghan risks his life on a perilous journey into the wilderness to find Pontiac, negotiate a peace agreement, and prevent all-out war.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - Wild Bill Hickok & the First Quick-Draw Duel: Wild Bill Hickok and his buddy, Davis Tutt, see their friendship fall apart over gambling debts and the affections of a beautiful woman. After Tutt swipes Wild Bill's prized timepiece as payback for a disputed debt, things begin to heat up. Then, when Tutt parades through town with the watch in one hand and Hickok's former girlfriend in the other, Wild Bill's blood begins to boil. Tutt refuses to return the watch, and he continues to flaunt the beautiful woman on his arm. The two men meet in the middle of town to settle their differences once and for all in what will become the very first quick-draw duel of the Old West. Both men reach for their pistols at the same time and fire! In an attempt to separate the truth from the fiction, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews George Ward Nichols, the journalist who immortalized the duel and created the legend of Wild Bill Hickok.

programme.desc: From midfield or the free throw line, it's impossible to miss if your eyes are on the prize.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.sub-title: Primal Divide - "Road To The Tactical Games
programme.desc: When Under Armour became the Title Sponsor of the Tactical Games, well…. I actually learned what the Tactical Games were. Kinda cross fit, kinda strong man all mixed with AR and pistol shooting. Ok, Sign me up!! But what did I just sign up for?! I was about to find out!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: John heads up to Saskatchewan to chase whitetails with BBD Outfitters. After some luck early in the week, an opportunity of a lifetime to take a moose is just a trigger pull away! John's friend Leslie, former Marine, and catfish angler is up to bat first as she checks off a whitetail buck and moose herself in this loaded episode! You don't know cold until it hits negative 33.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: With the Iowa Late Muzzleloader season almost over and a thick snow covering, hopes of filling “one more tag” were up in the air. A second chance at redemption was offered on an awesome 6.5 year old Iowa buck. Cold temps, food plots, and a favorable wind can be just the things needed to fill a late season tag.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: In most cases, the cameraman or woman hunts as well… Often their “play time” happens between scheduled season hunts for the show. But why don't we see those? This year, I made it a point to film all of my camera girl's hunts and decided to make an episode out of it. Without help, none of this possible! So to all the camera operators, behind the scenes industry folks… Thank you and this is for you!!!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: A last minute trip was added to the schedule when an opportunity to join the Rise Fishing Co crew in Andros Island for Bonefish and Barracuda. I started fly fishing a few years ago but this is the first time out in the open and dealing with ocean wind for the elusive Bones! Of all forms of fishing, this is for sure the closest thing I've matched to spot/stalk archery.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: Spring turkey is here! John sets his sights on chasing gobblers in Iowa and after notching the first tag, it's time to head back to Kentucky. John grew up in the Bluegrass state and doesn't get to hunt or visit as much as he'd like but after this season, he's reminded why it's important to return back home and keep that hunting camaraderie alive and well!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: After receiving an invite to hunt mule deer in Colorado from a buddy, I jumped at the opportunity. My first time ever hunting Colorado did not disappoint. Spot/stalk on the ground with a bow will always be the most challenging, humbling, and sometimes rewarding ways to hunt. My reward... a first ever velvet Colorado Mule Deer!

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "North America Deer Slam- Carmen Mountain Whitetail
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is south of the border in Mexico going after the elusive Carmen Mountain Whitetail. Known as the cousin to Coues deer, the Carmen Mountain Whitetail is small in stature but aggressive by nature. With the rut heating up Mark finds himself high on a glassing knob trying to make a move on a shooter buck.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: In this episode, Mark Peterson chases after a Red Stag, Black Buck and Fallow deer. There's no shortage of action in this video. Argentina's borders were closed during the peak of COVID, so these animals have not been hunted for two years, which led to a game rich environment and excellent trophy quality. On this adventure, Mark is joined by his dad Earl, brother Aaron and nephew Alec to chase some of the biggest free-range Red Stags in the world. Stay tuned for more on this family adventure in Argentina.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "North America Deer Slam- Oregon Columbia Whitetail
programme.desc: This week, Mark Peterson is in Oregon chasing the Columbia Whitetail. Found in only two counties of Oregon, the Columbia Whitetail is one of the most sought-after deer species. The first day posed its challenges with heavy fog at daybreak, but Mark and his guide Rob kept the pursuit for a big Columbia Whitetail. After putting on many miles throughout the morning, the fog began to lift and they finally laid eyes on their target buck. Moving into position had its challenges with plenty of satellite deer around, but in the end it came together. As an added bonus, Mark's buck is the new Muzzleloader world record Columbia Whitetail.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "North America Deer Slam- Northwestern Whitetails in Saskatchewan
programme.desc: It's early November and Mark Peterson heads north of the border to Saskatchewan to chase down his Northwestern whitetail. Unseasonably cold temps are staring Mark in the face and it has the deer hunkered down for a day and a half, but the power of food prevailed. On day two, with only 8 minutes left of shooting light, Mark's target buck showed up.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Cinnamon Teal Everywhere- First Hunt In Peru | The Journey Within, South American Waterfowl Slam
programme.desc: Mark's quest for the South America Waterfowl Slam has now taken him to Peru where he finds a surprising density of Cinnamon Teal. Although he already checked this species off the list in Argentina, his first hunt in Peru proves to be one of the best Cinnamon Teal shoots of his life. This is only the first afternoon and there are 5 days left to hunt the remaining 7 species.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "North America Deer Slam- Plains Whitetail in Colorado
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues on his Deer Slam and takes to the state of Colorado for the Plains Whitetail. Not often do you see more Moose than Whitetail, but after many miles on his Meindl Boots he finds a good buck bedded. A short stalk leads to quite a surprising walk-up.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "North America Deer Slam- California Mule Deer on Catalina Island
programme.desc: Join Mark Peterson as he continues on his journey for the North America Deer Slam. Next up on the list, he sets his sights on the California Mule Deer on Catalina Island. The boat ride to Catalina Island itself would be an adventure, seeing a ton of sea life along the way. Find out if Mark and another hunter in camp will succeed or if the island will prove itself to be a formidable opponent.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "North America Deer Slam- California Sambar On Hearst Ranch
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his journey for the North America Deer Slam. Next up on the list, a California Sambar. Sambar originated from Asia and were brought over to the Hearst Ranch in the early 1920s. After a fire wiped out the enclosure, they decided to let the animals roam the 80,000-acre estate. With proper management and selective harvests, these Sambar have thrived for the last 95 years.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Spot and Stalk White - Lipped Peccary
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is south of the border in Veracruz, Mexico going after a Mexican Gulf Coast Whitetail. When the whitetail action slowed down, Mark tried his luck at a spot-and stalk hunt for White-lipped Peccary. With hot temps, Mark and company try to find water that the Peccary will be targeting to stay hydrated.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: Join Captain Danny Allen and Hall of Fame winner Leiza Fitzgerald of CCA Florida Star as the 2 veteran anglers mix tactics and tackle ideas in the Steinhatchee flats! Join in while they fish through some foggy cool weather and teach transitional ways to consistently put fish in the boat while sharing some CCA Star Tournament details for 2024!!

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Capt Justin Leake and Meredith McCord divert attention from what's not happening with the tarpon bite to using CoastMaster, light tackle and experience to find snapper success on heavily fished public spots.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The grove around Berry Bitty City is abuzz with activity. The Berrykins are using their sparkles to harvest berries, Berrykin Bloom is in his garden spraying flowers with a special solution to make them larger, and Raspberry is nearby gathering flower petals to make perfume. The wind starts to blow and picks up some of the sparkles. The sparkles float along the wind and get combined with some of Berrykin Bloom's solution.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's time again for the Dance-Off between the Big Bitty City Dance Team and the Berry Bitty City Dancers. Plum is stressed out and frazzled because she desperately wants to win. And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is made to feel self-conscious about an old, patched-together rain coat that she has. When the kids put on a play version of Cinderella, Strawberry and the others are able to see that it's not what you wear that counts, but what you are.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls – until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Change Of Address
programme.desc: When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. Naturally, everything that can go wrong does go wrong – especially when the entire house disappears! When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. But after fending off Andrea's party plans, a Home Alone-style break-in (by the hapless Snivel, trying to retrieve incriminating evidence of the Mayor's latest scheme), and finally the entire house disappearing (“Uh, think Stephanie's Mom will notice?”), Stephanie comes to appreciate that responsibility is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Dive In
programme.desc: Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends – until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. The Friends each try to help, with disastrous results. Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends – until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. He's Tad, the new lifeguard, and just the sight of him reduces the normally fearless Andrea to a babbling wimp. The Friends all try to help her out, with less-than stellar results, each attempt resulting in increasing mayhem for Tad until he's terrified of Andrea. Then Andrea discovers that she's been mooning over the wrong boy all along!

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: I Told You So
programme.desc: Confined to a wheelchair after a failed Halloween attempt to prove herself a reporter, What's At Heart photographer Emma sees strange goings-on through her hospital window. She's convinced the neighbors are jewel thieves, but no one believes her – till the bad guys come after her! To show her Friends on the What's At Heart school paper that she's more than just a photographer, Emma investigates a scary old house on Halloween eve -- only to take a tumble and land in the hospital. There, confined to a wheelchair, she observes mysterious goings-on through her window which convince her that the neighbors are jewel thieves. Her friends, though dubious, agree to check it out. But after nearly getting caught by the neighbors, they come up empty and decide it's all just Emma's imagination. Meanwhile, up in Maternity, Sophie's having a baby! The girls run out, leaving Emma alone. And that's when the bad guys decide to pay Emma a visit…

programme.title: Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon's Mega-Weapon. In his most villainous attempt at using the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates a vortex through space and time to return to the moment Wu first arrives to recruit Kai to become a ninja (Episode 1, 2011) in order to rid the ninja from the future. The Ninja follow him back in time, only to make the mistake in saving Nya from the Skeletons. Suddenly, Past Kai doesn't have a need to become a ninja, so our current day heroes must fix the past to save their futures. The stakes rise as Garmadon catches wind the Ninja have followed him back in time and plans a dangerous trap. In a final battle, the ninja use the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon's Mega-Weapon, causing all of the legendary weapons to shoot off into the night sky. In the end, our heroes return back to the present and learn the Mega-Weapon has ceased to exist because it was destroyed in the past, leaving them all without their elemental powers.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels are causing a bit too much mess and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels enjoy a day at the beach and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels go on an adventure to find a shy creature and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee A weather warning leads the Squirrels to round up the creatures and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee teaches the Squirrels the things trees do and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Tag's feeling grumpy and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The squirrels have to solve the mystery of the missing red ruby and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels miniaturize themselves and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels learn about favorites and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee King Tiger looks after the Squirrels and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee hosts a Buddy Bonanza and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels try counting to 100 and other fun adventures.

programme.title: A Boy and His Dogs
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City. What the Berrykins mistook for a monster was really the bunch of cute pups Huck has been trying to get adopted. While Huck's van is being repaired, Strawberry invites Huck and his seven pups to spend the night in the new bedroom above the marketplace, while she bunks in her old bedroom above the café. The next morning, Strawberry discovers that the playful pups have given her bedroom a total makeover –the wrong kind. An embarrassed Huck insists on staying until he can repair the damage.

programme.title: Foods that are Purple
programme.desc: Purple powers activate! Avery and Matt cook up some freaky purple mashed potatoes witha side of purple coleslaw and then get artistic when they realize their plates need a little more colour. Lily ventures out to a gelato emporium to sample their rainbow-coloured flavours, learn how gelato is made, and find out if colour can affect a food's taste. Then it's blackberries versus blueberries as our hosts ask which fruit contains the most purple-staining action!

programme.title: Foods that Sizzle
programme.desc: Avery makes some noise when he and Matt create chicken & veggie fajitas with that classic restaurant sizzle. Lily gets cooking right at her table when she visits the sizzle experts: a Korean barbecue restaurant. Then it's a sizzle showdown as the Taste Buds cook up a traditional Greek feast... and see which skewered delight is the loudest on the grill. These foods have something to say!

programme.title: Super Science Tools
programme.desc: They're all perfect tools for investigating and exploring the world, but Sid can't figure out which one is his favorite! His friends help him discover that each science tool is amazing in its own special way.

programme.title: My Mushy Banana
programme.desc: After exploring how fruits and vegetables slowly change, Sid learns that it's natural for his banana to ripen and turn brown and mushy. Over time, fruits and vegetables decay!

programme.title: Camp New-Act One
programme.desc: Penny, Nattie, Emmie, and Jess are best friends who are spending their summer working at a creative arts center called All Things New. Together, they stage Art in the Park, a festival created for children to experience the joy of the arts. However, when a top talent scout shows up and offers Emmie's adopted brother, Isiah, a life of fame and fortune in Los Angeles, Isiah is forced to make some difficult choice that may compromise his beliefs, as well as his relationships with his family and the kids who look up to him at the center. Filled with music, dancing, art, comedy, and drama, New is a fun family film that inspires viewers of all ages to use their gifts for the Lord.

programme.title: Camp New-Humble Pie
programme.desc: Camp New: Humble Pie is an over-the-top Christian comedy for the entire family! Join the camp coordinators as they learn about walking in the fruit of the Spirit. Archer Ace is new to camp and with a lot of pride to boot. He challenges fellow coordinator, Penny, to a duel of athleticism that will prove, once and for all, who the greatest camp coordinator is. Meanwhile, Miss Mo and Penny try to keep camp running smooth when division starts sneaking in. They can't agree on the name of the fall extravaganza... or is it bonanza? Things fall further out of control when Miss Mo's pottery comes up missing and camp pranksters are on the loose. A full investigation ensues. Camp New has triumph and defeat, happy and unhappy campers (pun fully intended), and lessons of love, peace, and patience... all served up with a nice slice of “Humble Pie”.

programme.title: Blippi's Winter Olympics 2022
programme.desc: The Olympics are back! Blippi and Meekah want to learn all about winter sports.

programme.title: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit. He is especially hopeful that if the story is accepted, he can raise some funds for his new Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets.

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: LankyBox
programme.desc: LankyBox is Roblox superstars Justin and Adam, two best friends who love playing popular video games!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KIDZ BOP Kids
programme.desc: KIDZ BOP, the #1 Music Brand for Kids

programme.title: Bubble Bip

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate has difficulty letting go and embracing a softer side both at work and when she entrusts her dramatic mother with nanny duties. But Kate must call upon her “mama bear” instincts, when she is forced to help Frankie out of a dangerous situation. Meanwhile, Anne tries tough love with her wild child daughter, and Jenny attempts to attract the interest of her new manager, but fails — confusing him, and sending her further down a reckless road.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Eleanor quickly takes over babysitting duties running Kate's household and Charlie's schedule her way. Now that Kate's hired her, can she actually fire her own mother? Meanwhile, in an attempt to shut down her daughter's wild nature, Anne hires a “mean nanny” who can keep Alice in line, but also threatens to keep Anne in line too. And when Jenny's husband Ian surprises her at work, Jenny's flustered reaction leads Ian to wondering… why does Jenny suddenly love work so much?

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: When Gerry learns that former Olympic champion Donovan Bailey is coming to town, he's determined to seek retribution for a long-standing bone he has with the track “star.” Meanwhile, Simon decides to ask Nisha to the semi-formal dance, ignoring the pertinent detail that the dance is for the students and Robert feels left out when none of the students ask him to sign their yearbook.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry and Simon are both assigned student teachers. Gerry is thrilled to have a minion picking up the slack, while Simon is anxious about the added responsibility. Gerry soon learns that his hands-off approach will not work, as his student teacher, Gloria, is terrified of the students and requires Gerry's presence at all times. Meanwhile, in an effort to step up her fitness game, Bobbi takes supplements, to alarming results and Emma's fairytale characters bear alarming similarities to some of the staff.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: It's confirmation week and Mark is considering what life would be like if he became a priest. But when his mentor Father Moore is unexpectedly transferred, and rumors of child abuse among the clergy start to mount, Mark reassess what his religion means to him.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark and Ritche help make Christmas hampers for the needy, which leads to an uncomfortable discovery about one of their classmates. Meanwhile, Mike's Sr takes a second job at the mall after his visiting brother makes him feel bad about his lackluster gifts for the family.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: After losing their fortune, the Rose family must relocate to their last remaining asset - a small town Johnny once bought as a joke.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny must get permission to sell the town from its Mayor, Roland Schitt. David and Alexis spend a night out with the locals.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny tries to get a potentially offensive town sign taken down, while David is faced with the frightening task of finding a job.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira, feeling like they have failed as parents, try to get to know their grown children. Alexis spies on Mutt and thinks he's having an affair with the Mayor's wife.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate is itching to return to work after her maternity leave, but has deep misgivings about leaving her baby. With Kate in the midst of an identity crisis, can she still be the mother she wants to be while maintaining her competitive edge in the boys club that is her workplace? Meanwhile, Anne receives unwelcome news, which leaves her grappling with a life-changing decision. And Frankie tries – and fails - to keep her postpartum depression from affecting her work.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate tries to juggle it all: motherhood, work, exercise, baby classes, date night… and packs it in to the point of nearly jeopardizing a performance review at work. Luckily for Kate her reputation precedes her – and she's one of two candidates being considered for a promotion. Can Kate continue to pursue her career to the highest level? Meanwhile, Anne tries to reign in her sexually explicit nine-year-old daughter. And Jenny reluctantly returns to work where she reconnects with an old friend: her sex drive.

Davis and Karen use Hank in their training exercise that leads to chaotic results.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: The town sewer system breaks down which creates a public inconvenience. Emma and Oscar decide to have their portrait done.

programme.desc: A Taxman' arrives to investigate Oscar about fuel tax irregularities, Oscar plots with Hank to avoid paying any extra taxes, and Davis sulks about no longer getting free coffee at the Ruby and decides to lash out by writing all sorts of parking tickets.

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.desc: Brent tries to prove his prodigal cousin is a dork while Dog River puts on its annual talent show.

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: If your type of comedian is someone who reminds us all how funny we all are, Chris Strait is for you! No funny topic is off-limits for this California native but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Today that dream is more alive than ever as he is a 20-year veteran stand-up comedian, TV and radio personality, speaker and writer, who has performed on stages around the world. He has entertained millions in legendary venues ranging from Radio City Music Hall to chow halls in Afghanistan, to colleges, casinos and cruise ships.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Sarcastic and self-deprecating, Bill Boronkay jokes about being too ugly to work for ESPN, dating out of his tax bracket, and how society is centered around parents.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Scott Long tosses out sharp and clever lines that remind you of the differences between funny people and true comedic artists.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Heather Mabbott: I Didn't Mean To Say That
programme.desc: Her quick wit and unique style has dazzled audiences all over the country. Heather is a clean comedian and has performed with some of the best, like Caroline Rhea, Jimmy Walker, Bobcat Goldthwait, Bruce Baum, Sinbad, and many, many more.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Fred Klett has built a career from being a clean comedian, a style that is his trademark. His comedy is G-rated and focused to appeal to families with members of all ages since much of his material is taken from his experiences growing up in a large Christian family. As a mainstream performer, his brand of humor is rare and refreshing and is rooted in his faith in Christ and belief in the Holy Scriptures.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: With an array of impressions, stories, gestures and faces, Arvin's memorable performance is sure to please. As the former co-host of BET's Club Comic View, Arvin has been featured on Kevin Heart's “One Mic Stand”, Tony Rocks “The Funny Spot” as well as entertaining our troops abroad. Nominated as one of NBC's Stand Up for Diversity top comics Arvin continues to tour colleges, clubs, cruise ships & churches.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Drew Barth is one of the fastest rising comedy stars in the Northwest. Born just outside the city of Seattle, what started as a dare in high school has become a full-time career. Drew Barth has risen through the ranks of local open mics to become a regular performer at comedy clubs, colleges, casinos and private events up and down the West Coast. After making the finals of the Seattle International Comedy Competition, Drew Barth spent a great deal of time in Los Angeles performing at clubs such as The Comedy Store, Laugh Factory, and The Improv, honing his craft.

programme.title: Empire of the Sharks
programme.desc: In a water-covered future, humans pay tribute to a warlord, who rules the last land & is guarded by intelligent sharks. After a prisoner escapes, a rebellion ignites against the warlord & his sharks

programme.title: 2-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: When a Semester at Sea ship is sunk by a mutated two-headed shark, the survivors escape to a deserted atoll. But when it starts flooding, the coeds are no longer safe from the double jaws of the monster.

programme.title: Deadline
programme.desc: Alone and desolate, Martin Sanders is a recluse whose only for of entertainment comes from eavesdropping on the conversations of strangers. Slowly it becomes clear that he is not simply overhearing the passions of innocents... but the trappings of a serial killer... one that lives in his building and knows Martin has been listening. Now Martin has to find the identity of the killer before he finds his next victim. It is a vicious game of cat and mouse...

programme.title: A Map of the World
programme.desc: A school nurse (Sigourney Weaver) faces the scorn of her community after an accident on her property.

programme.title: A Map of the World
programme.desc: A school nurse (Sigourney Weaver) faces the scorn of her community after an accident on her property.

programme.title: Back Roads
programme.desc: A young man cares for his younger sisters after their mother is imprisoned for murdering their abusive father. When he strikes up an affair with a married woman, long-dormant family secrets bubble to the surface in this noir thriller.

programme.title: Metro
programme.desc: Moscow's underground train system sees terror after a collapsed tunnel causes massive flooding. Subtitled.

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
programme.desc: A single mother is brutally assaulted by a gang. When the criminals are set free, a detective plots revenge.

programme.title: Transsiberian
programme.desc: A Transsiberian train journey to Moscow becomes a thrilling chase of deception and murder.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Revelations
programme.desc: Harry and Meghan's decision to leave royal life behind was far and away from the stiff upper lip announcements of the past. This was a royal family feud that had gone completely out of control. This is the other side of the Sussex's story from alleged sources close to the couple and recently disclosed accounts.

programme.title: Sweet Micky For President
programme.desc: Music and politics collide when Pras Michel of Fugees returns to his homeland of Haiti to mobilize a presidential campaign for a controversial local musician: Michel Martelly aka Sweet Micky. When Pras's former bandmate, superstar Wyclef Jean, also enters the presidential race the election gains international notoriety attracting the likes of Bill Clinton, Sean Penn and Ben Stiller.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours
programme.desc: The world mourned the loss of one of it's most innovative performers in April 2016. While Prince's official autopsy confirmed that the singer died from an overdose of the painkiller fentanyl, investigators have still been looking to clear up some additional mysteries surrounding the case. We take a look into the last 24 hours of his death and look for the real answers as to what happened.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours
programme.desc: On the morning of December 8, 1980 John Lennon was happy in New York and looking forward to the future. Having just turned 40 he had finally recovered from the years as a Beatle. But by the end of that day John would be dead and the world would be in mourning. Here are the final 24 hours of the ex-Beatle's life before he was so senselessly murdered by Mark David Chapman."

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours
programme.desc: After a very public battle with addiction the world was saddened to hear the shocking news that Amy Winehouse was found dead in her bedroom at the young age of 27. We investigate what really happened during the final 24 hours of the singer's life, with exclusive interviews and testimonials.

programme.title: Holiday Baggage
programme.desc: Respectively a pediatrician and soon to be retired commercial pilot, Sarah and Pete Murphy, who have two grown daughters Lisa and Holly, have been legally separated for ten years. They lead different lives, Pete who lives hard, cavorts around the world and did cheat on Sarah when they were together, while Sarah is more focused on family. Since the separation which the girls mistakenly believe is a full divorce, Pete has been out of his family's life, he who has made little effort to keep in touch, while Lisa in particular has purposefully excluded her father from her life, including not inviting him to her wedding to longtime fiancé and family friend/neighbor Andrew Priester, and not having told him that they are having a baby. Sarah has not condoned Lisa's attitude, but also has done nothing to try and change it. Just prior to Thanksgiving, Pete is forced to return to Chicago to meet with Sarah when he makes the decision to remarry, to a woman named Kelly, who is young enough to be his daughter and with who he is moving permanently to the Bahamas, and thus requires Sarah to sign the final divorce papers. He expects solely to be in Chicago long enough to see Sarah and the girls to tell them the news and to invite them to the wedding. Out of circumstance, Pete is forced to stay in Chicago longer than he anticipated. In finding out about all that has and is going on in Sarah and the girls' lives, Pete may take stock of his relationships with them and if time will have healed all wounds in their family.

programme.title: Falling for Christmas
programme.desc: When champion figure skater Claire becomes injured she is sent to a rehabilitation center in the snowy mountains where she meets and falls for a local ice fisherman who shows her there is more to life than competition.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young woman who comes from a life of privilege falls for the owner of a soup kitchen after discovering a Dear Santa letter written by his seven year old daughter.

programme.title: The Merry In-laws
programme.desc: After Alex gets engaged to Peter, she goes to meet his parents for the first time, not knowing they are actually Santa and Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Harriet Craig
programme.desc: Harriet Craig runs a household with an iron fist, manipulating others in order to keep her place perfect, no matter the cost.

programme.title: Too Many Husbands

programme.title: Bryan Ferry
programme.desc: Bryan Ferry was born into a northern working-class family as the Second World War came to a close. His father handled pit ponies for the surrounding coal mines. Whilst studying fine art at Newcastle University, Ferry became exposed to the R&B, jazz and soul records that came in via the city's shipping ports. Ferry moved to London's Notting Hill at the start of the 1970s. It was here that he would quickly form his band, Roxy Music. He had such a strong vision for the band that before signing to Island Records he had the band's debut album and artwork completed. The first single, Virginia Plain was so remarkable in its maturity it entered the UK charts at number four .

programme.title: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: Birmingham in the late 1960s was an industrial city, packed with music groups. At its height, the New Musical Express had reported 500 on its bustling circuit and from two of these groups, Black Sabbath was formed. The Beatles would be a key influence for Ozzy, but bassist Geezer Butler also shaped Ozzy's work, through his lyrics After signing to Vertigo Records in 1970, the four piece used their distinctive sound to full effect for their self-titled debut album, Black Sabbath. Black Sabbath became a commercial success, entering the UK top 10 and the US charts. In it's first year it sold one million copies. Keen to build on the success, the band entered the studio just four months after releasing their debut. The title track, Paranoid, would lead the new album. Featuring archive material, music videos “PARANOID” “EVIL WOMAN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Iron Maiden
programme.desc: With sales near the 90 million mark and a career spanning over four decades, Iron Maiden are giants of the metal scene. The band grew out of London's East End in the early 70s when bassist Steve Harris tried to find the right musicians to suit his ambitious musical ideas. ‘The Number of the Beast' made Iron Maiden global superstars.To date it has sold 14 million copies. Iron Maiden continue to be one of the world's biggest metal acts. Their 2010 release, ‘The Final Frontier' entered at Number one in 28 countries. Featuring archive material, music videos – “RUNNING FREE” “RUN TO THE HILLS” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Nine Inch Nails
programme.desc: Nine Inch Nails have surpassed many of their contemporaries by continually pushing the boundaries of what a rock act should do. For a band that has consistently battled the corporate side of the music industry they have still managed to sell over 20 million albums worldwide. Although presented as a live unit, the music of Nine Inch Nails is the sole output of Producer and singer, Trent Reznor. As a young multi instrumentalist,Reznor took up a job at Right Track Studio where he began to produce his first album 1989's 'Pretty Hate Machine'. 'Head like a Hole' was the second release from the debut. It enjoyed heavy rotation on radio, and would become the breakthrough song for the band. 'Broken' was a turning point for the sound of Nine Inch Nails. It was also the point when Reznor founded Nothing Records to step away from his deal with label TVT. Nine Inch Nails had entered the mainstream with the success of the album, 'The Downward Spiral'. But it would be five years before singer Trent Reznor would release his next record, 'The Fragile' in 1999. In a deal with Columbia Records Nine Inch Nails released the 2013 single, 'Came Back Haunted'. The video was directed by David Lynch. Featuring archive material, music videos – “HURT” “CLOSER” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.desc: Guns N' Roses shocked and awed upon their arrival on the 80s rock scene. Their notoriety and musicianship bred sales of 150 million records, making them one of the world's biggest rock bands of all time. With his friend, Izzy Stradlin, Axl entered the Los Angeles music scene as the lead singer of rock band Hollywood Rose and from playing the Hollywood circuit, Guns N' Roses would soon emerge Signed to Geffen Records for a $75,000 advance, the band entered the studio to work on their debut, Appetite For Destruction Bassist Duff McKagan brought a riff to the recording studio and within three hours the band completed Welcome to the Jungle. The song would bring the group to the world's attention. After Welcome to the Jungle became an unexpected MTV hit, follow-up single Sweet Child of Mine was placed on heavy rotation on US radio play-lists. It went on to top the Billboard chart Featuring archive material, music videos – “PARADISE CITY” “WELCOME TO THE JUNGLE” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Secrets of the Wild

Hardt 3) The evolution of animal genitalia - Menno Schilthuizen 4) Unseen footage, untamed nature | Karen Bass 5) Grief and love in the animal kingdom | Barbara J. King

programme.title: Psych Out

Get to know yourself a bit better with this collection of thought-provoking ideas. 1) What is "normal" and what is "different"? | Yana Buhrer Tavanier 2) A colorful case for outside-the-box thinking on identity | Olivia Vinckier 3) Lessons from losing my mind | Andy Dunn 4) The origin of countless conspiracy theories - PatrickJMT 5) Dear fellow refugees, here's how I found resilience | Chantale Zuzi Leader 6) How we can use the hiring process to bring out the best in people | Gil Winch 7) Pros and cons of public opinion polls - Jason Robert Jaffe

programme.title: Art and Science of Love
programme.desc: A crash course on what it means to love -- and love well. (1) The difference between healthy and unhealthy love | Katie Hood (2) Why do we love? A philosophical inquiry - Skye C. Cleary (3) The brain in love | Helen Fisher (4) How to fix a broken heart | Guy Winch (5) Savitri and Satyavan: The legend of the princess who outwitted Death | Iseult Gillespie

programme.title: The Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Traveling to new destinations is always an experience. Insights and encouragement for you to think differently about the places you visit and the people you see. 1) The hidden treasures of Timbuktu | Elizabeth Cox 2) A tailored history of who wears what -- and why | Richard Thompson Ford 3) The rise and fall of the Kingdom of Man | Andrew McDonald 4) Playful, wondrous public spaces built for community and possibility | Matthew Mazzotta 5) Building the impossible: Golden Gate Bridge | Alex Gendler 6) Can we call it a "world map" if it's missing a billion people? | Rebecca Firth 7) Why the passport needs an upgrade | Karoli Hindriks 8) A feminist reimagining of Kenya's public transport | Naomi Mwaura

programme.title: Overlooked History
programme.desc: A collection of histories textbooks and school syllabuses leave out. 1) The Nazis recruited to win the Cold War | Brian Crim 2) Four sisters in Ancient Rome - Ray Laurence 3) From enslaved to kingmaker: Malik Ambar's legendary rise to power | Stephanie Honchell Smith 4) How could so many people support Hitler? | Joseph Lacey 5) History vs. Augustus - Alex Gendler and Peta Greenfield 6) What happened when these 6 dictators took over | Stephanie Honchell Smith 7) Einstein's miracle year - Larry Lagerstrom 8) From slave to rebel gladiator: The life of Spartacus - Fiona Radford 9) History vs. Tamerlane the Conqueror | Stephanie Honchell Smith

programme.title: Legends of Design
programme.desc: Some of history's greatest designers share intriguing perspectives and vignettes from their prolific journeys. 1) The function and fashion of eyeglasses | Debbie Millman 2) The ethical dilemma of self-driving cars - Patrick Lin 3) The power of the Afro pick | Jon Gray 4) How flags unite (and divide) us | Michael Green 5) How surfboards connect us to nature | Yves Béhar 6) How to unleash your inner maximalist through costume | Machine Dazzle 7) The city of walls: Constantinople - Lars Brownworth 8) A carbon-free future starts with driving less | Wayne Ting

programme.title: The Latest in Ideas
